stages.title: Site Analysis
stages.narration: Stage 1. Site analysis. Loh-Kaat houses are traditionally built in seismic mountainous regions where flexibility is essential.
stages.explanation: Loh-Kaat houses are traditionally built in seismic mountainous regions where flexibility is essential.

stages.title: Setting Out
stages.narration: Stage 2. Setting out. Building grid and wall centerlines are established on the mountain platform.
stages.explanation: Accurate layout ensures proper alignment of timber bands and masonry walls.

stages.title: Excavation
stages.narration: Stage 3. Foundation trenches are excavated to competent bearing soil.
stages.explanation: Foundations transfer structural loads into competent ground.

stages.title: Stone Foundation
stages.narration: Stage 4. Stone masonry foundation courses are laid in mud mortar.
stages.explanation: Stone foundations provide stability and distribute loads to the soil.

stages.title: Timber Treatment
stages.narration: Stage 5. Timber members receive protective treatment and seasoning for durability.
stages.explanation: Proper timber treatment improves durability and resistance to insects and moisture.

stages.title: Plinth Timber Band
stages.narration: Stage 6. The plinth timber band is installed continuously around the structure with interlocked corners.
stages.explanation: The plinth timber band ties the entire structure together.

stages.title: Masonry Wall Construction
stages.narration: Stage 7. Stone and brick masonry walls rise in mud mortar to support gravity loads.
stages.explanation: The masonry provides gravity load support while timber bands improve seismic performance.

stages.title: Mid-Height Timber Band
stages.narration: Stage 8. The mid-height timber band is now installed. This continuous timber element ties the masonry walls together and improves resistance against earthquake-induced cracking.
stages.explanation: Mid-height bands improve wall integrity and prevent cracking.

stages.title: Window and Door Openings
stages.narration: Stage 9. Door and window frames are installed with timber reinforcement around openings.
stages.explanation: Openings are weak points and require additional strengthening.

stages.title: Lintel Timber Band
stages.narration: Stage 10. The lintel timber band is installed above openings to tie the structure together.
stages.explanation: The lintel band prevents wall separation during earthquakes.

stages.title: Timber Columns and Corner Reinforcement
stages.narration: Stage 11. Timber columns and corner reinforcements improve ductility and lateral stability.
stages.explanation: Timber reinforcement improves ductility and earthquake resistance.

stages.title: Roof Frame Construction
stages.narration: Stage 12. Timber rafters and purlins form a lightweight roof frame.
stages.explanation: Lightweight timber roofs reduce earthquake loads.

stages.title: Roof Covering
stages.narration: Stage 13. CGI or timber roof sheeting is installed with proper fasteners.
stages.explanation: Proper roof anchorage improves resistance to wind and seismic forces.

stages.title: Finishing Works
stages.narration: Stage 14. Wall finishes, doors, windows, and flooring are completed.

stages.title: Completed Structure
stages.narration: Construction complete. The timber bands provide continuity and ductility, significantly improving earthquake performance of traditional Loh-Kaat construction.
stages.explanation: Traditional mountainous house with continuous Kaat timber band network.

stone_foundation.title: Stone Foundation
stone_foundation.loadDistribution: Spreads wall loads over bearing area on mountain soil.
stone_foundation.settlementControl: Wide stone base reduces differential settlement.

timber_band.title: Timber Band (Kaat)
timber_band.ductility: Allows controlled deformation without brittle separation.
timber_band.continuity: Continuous ring ties walls at plinth, mid, and lintel levels.
timber_band.earthquakeResistance: Prevents out-of-plane wall failure during shaking.

masonry_wall.title: Masonry Wall
masonry_wall.compressionBehavior: Bearing walls work primarily in compression.
masonry_wall.loadTransfer: Gravity loads pass to stone foundation and bands.

corner_reinforcement.title: Corner Reinforcement
corner_reinforcement.connectionDetails: Traditional joinery with metal connectors where used.

roof_frame.title: Timber Roof Frame
roof_frame.forceDistribution: Triangulated frame spreads loads to wall bands.
